<!-- Description: Analyze existing brownfield project and generate improvement roadmap -->

# ensemble:analyze-product

> **Mission:** Analyze an existing brownfield project to understand its architecture, identify improvement opportunities, and generate a comprehensive roadmap with PRD for enhancements.

## Phase 1: Project Discovery

### Step 1: Codebase Analysis

Scan and analyze existing codebase structure

### Step 2: Architecture Assessment

Identify architectural patterns and technologies

### Step 3: Documentation Review

Review existing documentation and identify gaps

## Phase 2: Gap Analysis

### Step 1: Technical Debt Identification

Identify areas of technical debt

### Step 2: Opportunity Assessment

Identify improvement and optimization opportunities

## Phase 3: Roadmap Generation

### Step 1: PRD Creation

Generate PRD for identified improvements
